# SchemaInfo.GetRelAssignPropertyClasses property

Returns the type constraint for the classes that can be related to a property. This could help UI editors to filter the list depending on existing constraints on a facet.

```csharp
public IIfcTypeConstraint? GetRelAssignPropertyClasses { get; }
```
